meaning: n.长毛绒adj.长毛绒做的,豪华的,舒服的
examples: The Carlton-intercontinental hotel is lush, plush, and very non- backpacker.
The plush chairs absorb sound and soften reverberation.
I am planning a trip to the United States and I'll call on you at your office to discuss the price of the plush toy at 10:00 am, TUE, SEP 18, 2005.
More important, golfers can do their part by lowering expectations of plush carpets of green grass.
Rooms combine classic and contemporary touches such as plush Duxiana beds, original art and Nespresso machines.
